title: Candy Burst Popcorn
description: Big fan for sweet popcorn and candy puzzle game? Match and collect 3 or more candies or Popcorn in Popcorn and Candy Burst. Create sweet boosters to achieve the highest score and win 3 stars with each puzzle. Join and share the fun in Popcorn and Candy Burst!
